speaker.title: ICLR 2026
speaker.location: Riocentro Convention and Event Center, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
speaker.description: The International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) is the premier gathering of professionals dedicated to the advancement of the branch of artificial intelligence called representation learning, but generally referred to as deep learning.

speaker.title: Deep Patterns
